trends.headline: Medicube's PDRN pink peptide serum is SkincareTok's affordable 'salmon DNA' glow
trends.body: Creators are racking up before/after videos with Medicube's PDRN pink peptide serum, framing it as a budget way to get the buzzy salmon-DNA repair ingredient without a luxury price tag. Easy angle: a 7-day texture-and-glow diary or a 'is the viral PDRN serum worth it' honest review.

trends.headline: Beauty of Joseon Rice Sunscreen is SkincareTok's no-white-cast summer SPF
trends.body: As summer heat sets in, the Beauty of Joseon Rice Sunscreen SPF50+ is resurging as the recommended everyday face SPF for its dewy, no-white-cast finish. Creator angle: a 'sunscreen that actually disappears on camera' GRWM test or a swatch comparison across skin tones.

trends.headline: Culottes are FashionTok's go-to summer bottom right now
trends.body: Culottes have leveled up from niche piece to summer wardrobe staple, styled with heeled boots for a polished look or loafers for casual. Creator angle: a 'one pair of culottes, five outfits' styling reel or a 'how to wear culottes if you're petite' guide.

trends.headline: 'Coastal Cowgirl' styling is FashionTok's eclectic summer look
trends.body: The Coastal Cowgirl aesthetic — denim, leather, wide-brimmed hats and linen mixed with western touches — is back for summer with a more eclectic 2026 mix. Creator angle: a 'styling Coastal Cowgirl on a budget' thrift haul or a transition video from beach to barn-party fit.

trends.headline: 'Savory-maxxing' has FoodTok ditching sweets for salty snack plates
trends.body: FoodTok is leaning anti-sweet: pickled-everything, salty snack boards and savory toppings (goat cheese, hot honey, pickles on chips) are racking up views over dessert content. Creator angle: a 'build a savory snack plate with me' ASMR assembly or a 'pickle girl summer' fridge-stock haul.

trends.headline: Japanese strawberries are FoodTok's breakout fruit of 2026
trends.body: Premium Japanese strawberries are this year's breakout produce, posting big year-over-year growth and millions of recipe posts as creators show them in desserts and tasting videos. Creator angle: a 'are $10 Japanese strawberries worth it' taste test or a strawberry-shortcake recipe using them.

trends.headline: #SleepyGirlMocktail is back as FoodTok's summer wind-down drink
trends.body: The Sleepy Girl Mocktail — tart cherry juice plus magnesium and a splash of soda — is resurging as a nightly wind-down drink creators film as part of evening routines. Creator angle: a 'making the viral Sleepy Girl Mocktail every night for a week' sleep diary or a flavor-variations video.

trends.headline: 'Pilates Princess' mini-reformer routines are FitTok's summer movement
trends.body: The Pilates Princess trend keeps climbing, with creators posting fluid mat flows and at-home mini-reformer routines framed as low-impact, aesthetic and approachable. Creator angle: a '10-minute mini-reformer flow you can do at home' or a 'Pilates Princess GRWM + workout' combo.

trends.headline: Color-coded pantry organization is HomeTok's satisfying summer reset
trends.body: Color-coded condiments, labeled jars and food 'zones' are driving a wave of satisfying pantry-reset videos as creators tidy small kitchens for summer. Creator angle: a 'restock and reorganize my pantry with me' time-lapse or a 'pantry zones on a budget' Dollar-store version.

trends.headline: Loop Experience 2 earplugs are TechTok's $35 everyday-carry gadget
trends.body: Loop's Experience 2 earplugs keep going viral on TechTok for dampening sound without muffling it — pitched for concerts, focus and sensory overwhelm. Creator angle: a 'gadgets in my everyday-carry' reel or a 'testing viral Loop earplugs at a loud restaurant' review.

trends.headline: The Honey Bear Straw Cup is ParentTok's viral toddler must-have
trends.body: The Honey Bear Straw Cup keeps trending on ParentTok as a teaching tool for toddlers learning to use a straw, with parents posting genuine 'it actually worked' clips. Creator angle: a 'viral baby products I tested — worth it or skip' roundup or a straw-training how-to.

trends.headline: Reusable pet-hair remover rollers are PetTok's most satisfying summer buy
trends.body: Reusable pet-hair rollers and double-sided deshedding brushes are going viral on PetTok thanks to dramatic before/after piles of fur — peak shedding season makes them instant satisfying content. Creator angle: a 'deshedding my husky for the first time' reveal or a 'pet-hair gadgets ranked' test.

trends.headline: '5 things nobody tells you' tip videos are TravelTok's summer format
trends.body: Advice-driven travel videos ('5 things nobody tells you about visiting X') are outperforming pure aesthetic montages, pairing quick utility with high watch-through. Creator angle: shoot a fast-cut tips list for your last trip, or a '$50 a day in [city] vs [city]' comparison to spark comment debate.

trends.headline: Maximalist charm necklaces are JewelryTok's storytelling summer trend
trends.body: Charm-based jewelry — loaded charm necklaces and DIY charm builds — is replacing minimalist pendants as JewelryTok leans into personalization and storytelling. Creator angle: a 'build a charm necklace that tells my story' DIY or a 'where to source cheap charms' haul.
